highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Malla Reddy College of Engineering:

faqs.question: Is Malla Reddy College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Malla Reddy College of Engineering is a reputed institute for MBA/PGDM, B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Malla Reddy College of Engineering has a review rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview: Many students looking for better jobs

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Both in core & non-core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    Malla Reddy College of Engineering has been rated 3.3 on placements on the basis of 108 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Malla Reddy College of Engineering?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Malla Reddy College of Engineering offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Malla Reddy College of Engineering courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Malla Reddy College of Engineering courses stands around INR 54,000 to 3,20,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Malla Reddy College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3 years duration (Except Oriental Languages) and secured the above mentioned percentage.
45% is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved category.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) within the jurisdiction of University should have recognition by joint committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Malla Reddy College of Engineering for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Malla Reddy College of Engineering has courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Engineering. Malla Reddy College of Engineering has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Malla Reddy College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Malla Reddy College of Engineering are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Malla Reddy College of Engineering goes up to 1200.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In 2015 there are good placements but now less than that.

review_content.Placements: 85 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 24 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.3 LPA. We are placed for jobs through college placements. In our course, almost 85 percent of students in our class got placed in jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, the infrastructure is good. There are smart TVs for students. Wi-Fi and a library are available in our college, and we have Wi-Fi facilities for internet access. Labs are neat and clean, and computers are upgraded to newer versions in the labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Malla Reddy College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: I am a fresher, but what I have seen or heard is that many members got an average package of 3.5 LPA to 5 LPA, and the highest package for the last night is 22 LPA. The companies which are hiring are Renault, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, etc. Such good companies came and hired them.
review_content.Infrastructure: We are having ethernet cables connected to our class for Wi-Fi, and the board is a tech board. The classroom is huge, which looks modern. The quality of our college facilities is not super modern, but our management is trying to change it into having good infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college. Placements are quite good. Events are very rare. Overall, the college is good.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 900 students. Out of 900, 200 students get placement in very good companies. The packages are between 3.5 and 8 LPA. Companies like Infosys and Microsoft are included in the placement. Many members get internships at our college. Many are very selective.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good. The infrastructure is also good in our college and department. Every class has Wi-Fi, and labs are very good. We have a very good library. The quality of food in the mess and canteen. The medical facilities are excellent. Sports are also very well encouraged.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the structured plan of study and placement.

review_content.Placements: Out of 180 students in CSE, 120 get placed. The highest package is 50 LPA offered by Amazon. The second highest is 9 LPA. Many other companies recruit students. The most offered role for a fresher is a software engineer. They guide well in placement seminars. Faculty work together to help students achieve something before completing the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good, including classrooms, a library, and labs, but Wi-Fi is not provided in the classrooms. The atmosphere in the hostel is better, but the food quality in the mess needs improvement. The canteen food is the best. We also have a medical facility and an ambulance for emergencies. Coming to sports and games, we have many, but mostly, there are fewer events. The college itself mostly concentrates on studies and placements rather than other activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great learning environment with supportive faculty members and excellent placements.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has excellent placement and internship opportunities with a large majority of students successfully placed in repeated organisations. The highest package very impressive offered by top multinational companies. While the average package maintained competitive and above industry standards, ensuring strong career perspective for everyone leading recruiters such as Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Deloitte, Microsoft, Google, Flipkart, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Flipkart actively participate, offering diverse roles in software development, data analyst, business analysis, data analysis and engineering. Most students secured in internship, well-known companies like Amazon delight, Infosys Microsoft, TCS start-ups, which provided valuable real-world exposure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college infrastructure is decent.

review_content.Placements: 70% percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 15 LPA, the lowest package is 4LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. The Top recruiting companies in our college are TCS, Wipro, and LG. 60% of students got internship in our course in TCS and Wipro.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities in our college. The infrastructure of labs, classrooms, and the library is very cool and decent. They are providing Wi-Fi in the full campus area. The hostel food is very decent, and students love to eat our mess food, and they provide medical facilities.

cut_off.college_name: Malla Reddy College of Engineering Cutoff 2025: Check TS EAMCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Malla Reddy College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the Malla Reddy College of Engineering TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

Malla Reddy College of Engineering TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 22226 and 36267 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 22226, 23173 and 26209, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Malla Reddy College of Engineering. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

College has a big library, and all books are available to read during exam times. The environment is also good. The college hostel is good, and all the facilities are nice. The medical facilities are also good. Games are available to play in free time. Mess is good. The food is very tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and I suggest this college to everyone.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college, and we enjoyed ourselves a lot. It is the best college and I suggest students join it. The canteen is good and it contains delicious food products, which are very good among all colleges.

reviews.review_heading: The college is well-facilitated. Staff are well-educated and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in our college doesn't work properly. The library is okay. Labs are well-equipped, but the canteen is not provided. We have sports every week for one hour, and we participate in many games like chess, table tennis, badminton, etc. Stationery is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Unpredictable college, but nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities they are providing are very nice, and the infrastructure is premium. The facilities include Wi-Fi, labs, a library to read books, and very decent classroom facilities. Hostel facilities include Wi-Fi, a gym, very hygienic food in the mess and canteen, and they are also providing medical facilities in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placement with an average package of 4.20 LPA. But the highest salary package is 24 LPA.
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms equipped with sockets for every student and LAN cables for each student with central air-conditioning. We also have a digital library. Hostel is average, and the quality of food is eatable. For medical security, we get an ambulance in college. We also get sports clubs and grounds.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and almost all the classes are equipped with smartboards, and there is a good Wi-Fi connection. There is a separate block for library, and all the labs are good. College also has a college hostel, which is good with all the facilities, the food is great, and it also has good Wi-Fi and well-maintained rooms and beds to sleep.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, excellent placements, and nice infrastructure are available in our college.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are well-maintained and clean. The library has many books. There is no canteen in our college, and only one shop is available. Medical facilities are not available in our college. Sports hour is held twice a week, and we enjoy ourselves a lot during the sports period.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with the placements from our course in our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available on the campus include good infrastructure, a bigger lawn, a library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, project labs, auditorium, seminar halls, AC labs, etc. There are a total of three blocks in the hostel for both boys and girls with AC and non-AC facilities. The food is excellent in both hostel and canteen, sports like cricket, basketball, volleyball, and other indoor games are played regularly in the college premises. Medical services are also great with profession...

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions:

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: How can I get into JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.
M.E./M.Tech Candidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognised by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute of Engineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible.

faqs.question: Which courses does JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions offer to students?
faqs.answer: JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, Production Engineering, Communications Engineering.

placements.overview: Established in 2010, JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 10 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Engineering. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Engineering, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,47,758 to 2,95,516. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions is up to 449. Good thing to know is that JIT - Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.review_title: A very bad college. Please close this college.

review_content.Placements: No student got placement. It is all fake. They demand money from students.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi and the water supply is very bad. For 2 days there was no water. It is the worst college in Jaipur when compared to others. Please do not get admission to this college. The government should help students for their future. The hostel of this college is a fraud. Administration should help students. Administration and staff are very bad and whenever there is a new student the staff torcher starts.
review_content.Faculty: The staff is very bad. Director and dean madam are not good. New students looking for a college, please do not take admission in this college. This college campus should be closed. They conduct fake tests and no practical is conducted in my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college in Jaipur.

review_content.Placements: It is an excellent institute in Rajasthan. We are the second-ranked college in Rajasthan. Almost 70-80% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is good. The campus environment is good. Hostel facilities are available. The quality of the food in the hostel is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied with college due to fewer faculty members available and bad infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Very few students are getting placed from the college. The package offered is around 1.2 LPA. From the past two years, no companies came for placements as per my information. If any company comes for placements, the package offered is low and not suitable for a B.Tech student. That's why many students reject it and placement percentage is almost zero. Always verify thoroughly before getting admission in any college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good but not the hostel. Hostel is not available in the college and students have to look for a hostel on their own.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Jaipur Institute of Technology, Group of Institutions offer many placements. About 70% of students are placed. The majority of students in mechanical engineering are placed at Mahindra. Different internships are provided for all courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a good library. All course books are available, and other books are also available. There are different labs for different branches. There are good classrooms with a better environment. All medical and sports facilities are available. There is a canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and faculty members are good but placements are not good.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio is not so good in our college. There are no famous companies that have ever visited. No internship was provided to us. We are dissatisfied with the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good at our college. Management will be maintained. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Labs are well cleaned and provide good facilities. Sports grounds are not good. We have to play only in the park. The food served in the mess is not good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are very helpful in providing knowledge. They are well qualified from the best institutes and are always ready to solve any kind of problems related to studies, fees, and others. They are very friendly with students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: In my college placements are good.

review_content.Placements: In B.Tech Civil Engineering, there is scope of placements and jobs. The job of Site engineers and project managers are offered by many companies and groups of industries. So B.Tech in Civil Engineering is the best Engineering branch in comparison to others.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, for B.Tech- Civil (CE), Mechanical (ME), Electrical (EE), Electronics and communication (ECE), Computer Science (CSE) are the branches of Engineering B.Tech degree. In my college, the well graded Computer lab is open with ethernet for students at 9 am to 5 pm.

reviews.review_heading: A very bad college. Please close this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi and the water supply is very bad. For 2 days there was no water. It is the worst college in Jaipur when compared to others. Please do not get admission to this college. The government should help students for their future.  The hostel of this college is a fraud. Administration should help students. Administration and staff are very bad and whenever there is a new student the staff torcher starts.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is good. The campus environment is good. Hostel facilities are available. The quality of the food in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with college due to fewer faculty members available and bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good but not the hostel. Hostel is not available in the college and students have to look for a hostel on their own.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has a good library. All course books are available, and other books are also available. There are different labs for different branches. There are good classrooms with a better environment. All medical and sports facilities are available. There is a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members are good but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good at our college. Management will be maintained. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Labs are well cleaned and provide good facilities. Sports grounds are not good. We have to play only in the park. The food served in the mess is not good.

reviews.review_heading: In my college placements are good.
reviews.review_text: In my college, for B.Tech- Civil (CE), Mechanical (ME), Electrical (EE), Electronics and communication (ECE), Computer Science (CSE) are the branches of Engineering B.Tech degree. In my college, the well graded Computer lab is open with ethernet for students at 9 am to 5 pm.

reviews.review_heading: Superb infrastructure along with well-equipped laboratories.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is ATIT best. If you visit here you will find that there is great maintenance all around the campus. Fully maintained playground and classrooms. There is a separate ground staff for their maintenance. The best part is its laboratories where you will what you need to do for your projects.

reviews.review_heading: At least make a visit to our college. You will surely change your mind.
reviews.review_text: I'll not say that out college is best in terms of infrastructure, but it's well designed. The campus is very large. We have our own football and cricket grounds. We have a garden of our own. I'm not saying to take admission in this college, but at least give a try.

reviews.review_heading: Visit the college before taking an admission in other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. We have well-maintained labs. Have a visit to our college and let yourself know it well. The students here are quite happy about infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure well settled labs and classrooms and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: Jaipur Institute of Technology Group of Institutions spread over 13 acre land in mahindra world city, sez in kalwara. Full college Wi-Fi enabled and complete library with wide range of books, papers and also available magazines. Classroom and labs are well settled, projectors also in classrooms and the labs are fully computerized and high range of equipment are available.

reviews.review_heading: 5star The college is best and have all the facilities so if you want to go for engineering you must.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in the college. There is very big library in the college where you can find all type of book, magazine and many interesting book. There are clubs of the cultural activities in the college the environment of college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: There are no chances to make a better future at this college.
reviews.review_text: It is not a useful college; there is only a little chance for success. The college has a minimum number of faculty members, and they do not work properly. So we can say that the college is established only for business purpose. So in my opinion, it is the poorest college of engineering.

reviews.review_heading: My review is based on my curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is not so well. The ground is too big but not neat and clean. The infrastructure of the college is okay. Laboratories are good. Staff are also good. The college is divided into parts, and all the students are also divided according to their branch.

reviews.review_heading: Best four years of my life and all the experiences we got here are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. If I talk about just the campus, it's too good. The labs are with all types of machines and equipment required for every branch is available. The computer labs are also good. The library is very big and all useful books other than books related to course also available. The medical facility is available during the college hours and 24*7 in the hostel. Sports and games facilities are also very good with both indoor and outdoor like cricket, volleybal...

reviews.review_heading: Placement wise, it's not a good college but faculty members have good grab on their specialization.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It is spread over 13 acres large campus of the institute. It has a separate cricket and football ground and cafeteria with the hygienic environment. The full campus is secured with CCTV and Wi-Fi, almost all the great author's books are available in the library.

highlights.summary: The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent college with good infrastructure, education, and environment.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunities are very less in Raichur since it's a small city, and very few (usually local) companies come for recruitment. So don't expect too much regarding placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, labs of civil, CS, and ECE are equipped well, and classrooms are big & have full ventilation There is a library, but there are no seating arrangements there, but you can take the books to your class or home. Our hostel is currently being used by IIIT students, but there are many hostels like Minority Hostel, BCM Hostel, SC-ST Hostel, etc., where students can live.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the faculty are good. On average, 700 students are present in our college. Our class has 70 students. The highest package offered is about 7 LPA. Many companies came to our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and good buildings. We have 2 blocks, an administration block, and another block is for civil and mechanical branches. The classrooms have good lighting and fans. A library is available. A canteen is available. Good services and food are available. Playgrounds are also available.
review_content.Faculty: The college has government lecturers. There are different lecturers for different subjects. It makes students industry-ready. It's a technical course. The college offers higher education as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, along with excellent and supportive staff.

review_content.Placements: No one got placed in campus placements from our batch because there were placements then, but our placement in-charge informed us about off-campus drives. Maybe now, our college has improved in terms of campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. The classrooms were neat and clean with the comfortable seating arrangement. Even the lab facilities were excellent. We never faced any problems during our practicals. The hostel food was tasty and healthy too, and it was like home-made.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: No placements, dissatisfied with placements. Only lab is good.

content.Placements: I am studying in the final year now, not even a single student from our college has been placed. Our college doesn't have placement opportunities. I highly recommend not to join our college for upcoming juniors. Please take admission to colleges that are in Bangalore.
content.Infrastructure: No hostel is provided in our college. We have to search for PG, rooms, or hostels. Lab infrastructure is good (7/10). If we want BCM hostel, we can join. But it is far away from the college (10 km).
content.Faculty: Teaching is not that good. Only few lecturers teach well. But they also don't help us with the coding part. We have to study by ourselves for some subjects. Our college has a lack of teaching facilities. Some teachers teach like they are doing seminars, even some of my friends do better seminars than those teachers.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good about college faculty members and teaching levels of lecturers.

content.Placements: Almost 100 % of students get admission to our college according to their eligibility marks. There will be no company to recruit our college students, as no company will come and recruit our college, there are no campus placements from our college. We will get internships from our college at various companies like Nashuatec company in Shaktinagar, Raichur.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are very good for all the departments. For all the departments there are good laboratories and a big and separate library for separate branches students. The quality of food available in our mess and canteen is average. The medical facility is very good in our college, And they provide support and games for the students, sports like cricket, basketball, etc.

There is a library, but there are no seating arrangements there, but you can take the books to your class or home. Our hostel is currently being used by IIIT students, but there are many hostels like Minority Hostel, BCM Hostel, SC-ST Hostel, etc., where students can live.

We never faced any problems during our practicals. The hostel food was tasty and healthy too, and it was like home-made.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements, laboratory, and lack of classrooms, etc.
reviews.review_text: If a college has good infrastructure, it favours students' studies. Our college is not good at infrastructure. Water facility and canteen facilities are not available here. There was no bus facility. The major problem is we don't have any lab facility. There was no proper equipment in the laboratory. Students faced a lot of problems due to the lack of laboratory facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has strong academics, solid infrastructure, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-maintained with smartboards, and labs are fully equipped. Wi-Fi is reliable across the campus. Hostel rooms are clean. The mess food is decent. Sports facilities include basketball and badminton courts. Medical help is available onsite.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placement but infrastructure needs attention in government colleges.
reviews.review_text: In my CSE department, there are computers and classrooms are the best. Library is good. There is no hostel facility, we need to go 3 km far away which is the government BCM. There is no canteen and no sports facilities. Hostel food is not good and games are only NSS activities. Wi-Fi is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Education is good, but other activities are not conducted.
reviews.review_text: This college's education is good, and lab and facilities for study purposes are available. Everything is there in this college. Out of education, nothing is there. Those who want only education should join this college. Coming to sports, only cricket is available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. We have two buildings one is for CS and EC departments, and another building is for the civil and mechanical branches. Laboratory is very good. It also provides a decent library. Playground is available. We can also play indoor and outdoor games like cricket, basketball, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placement rate.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure and good buildings. There are 2 blocks; an administration block and another block for civil and mechanical branches. The classrooms have good lighting and fans. A library is available. A canteen is available. Good services and food are available. The playgrounds are well fenced.

reviews.review_heading: College is good with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and library is also available. Computer labs are available with all facilities. Classroom has projector facility along with the normal board. No ragging of juniors by seniors is strictly prohibited. There is no canteen facility.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of SVS Group of Institutions, Warangal.

review_content.Placements: In our course, 100 percent of students were placed, and the students here are both talented and intelligent. They perform well academically and secure excellent job placements. The highest salary package offered during placements is 25 lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies include Genpact, Infosys, and many software firms, and 85% of students received internships through our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel and campus provide good infrastructure for our course and others. The hostel offers wholesome and homely food, along with reliable Wi-Fi for studying and attending online classes without any connectivity issues. We also have comfortable accommodations, including beds, cupboards, lockers and clean bathrooms. The food provided in the mess is hygienic and there's a budget-friendly canteen available for when we want to have a change from the mess food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, and the college has delivered good placements.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% to 85% of students got placed. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Adobe, and Microsoft. The highest salary offered is 12 LPA, while the lowest is 3 LPA. The top roles secured are web developer, database administrator, and project manager. Additionally, around 68% of students secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided by the college and the premises around it are just wonderful. The college infrastructure is good, and my department has separate blocks. Wi-Fi facilities are also available. The college has a huge library, and the computer labs are well-equipped. The college also has a big ground.

The food provided in the mess is hygienic and there's a budget-friendly canteen available for when we want to have a change from the mess food.

admission_process.title: SVS Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SVS Institute of Technology admission2025 is completely based on the entrance exam as per respective courses. The institute offers courses, such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admitted to SVS Institute of Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at SVSIT is conducted both online or offline. Read the following article to know more aboutSVS Institute of Technologycourse admission2025.

SVS Institute of Technology admission 2025is entrance-based. The institute also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses such as MTech, MPharma, etc. The institute offers more than 12 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Management, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutSVS Institute of Technology course admissions2025:
Particulars
SVS Institute of Technology Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

SVSIT courses' admissions are based on merit. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSVS Institute of Technology courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
BTech with a 50% aggregate
Graduate with a 50% aggregate
Graduate with a 50% aggregate

SVS Institute of Technology admissionsis completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SVS Institute of Technology is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: SVS Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://www.svsit.ac.in/student-registration-form for admission to the various programme. However, candidates also apply offline. To apply offline students must download the application form available at the official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute admits students based on entrance exams such as TS EAMCET, TS PGECET, etc. for courses like BPharma, MPharma among others. For the final selection, it also considers the candidates' academic performance.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSVS Institute of Technology feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

SVS Institute of Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 65647 and 125616 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, u

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 65647, 77315 and 96508, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The SVS Institute of Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 43087. reviews.review_text: We have nice infrastructure and library including digital library and we have all the main courses in our college. There is no campus, hostel but we have one cafeteria and we have indoor games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SVS Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and a good campus atmosphere. In our department EEE, labs are good. All the equipment is available in the computer lab. Wi-Fi is also available. The infrastructure of classrooms is good. The library has so many books for all branches. We have indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is there but only for labs. Classrooms are good and good faculty is there. They guide me and motivate me. Hostel facilities are there, good but not at all quality. Food is okay. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games are there on my campus, good mess.

reviews.review_heading: Budget friendly by situation .
reviews.review_text: The thing I don't like is the infrastructure; the library is average but enough for all the students. There is no Wi-Fi anywhere; if it is there, then it doesn't work. There is no hostel facility for boys; you have to stay in private hostels. There are no games either.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied due to substandard infrastructure, faculty and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: CSE only has one floor in the B.Tech Block, Wi-Fi access is denied for students, classrooms don't even have proper ceiling fans and boards will not be visible sometimes because of glare and it will be really hot in classrooms in summer. There is one common library for entire college in which CSE has a rack of books, inventory of books for CSE can be anywhere around 70-200 and Internet can be accessed through computers in library. Most of the computers don't work in Labs and they are maintained p...

reviews.review_heading: The quality of educational life is very good.
reviews.review_text: We have some of the best labs, high-tech computers, and a well-stocked library with great books from around the world on every subject. The hostel is good. It serves clean and healthy food. They conduct games regularly. We also have a medical team to support unexpected accidents.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the college and I wouldn't recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The library is available for students. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. Our classrooms are average. Our college does not provide a hostel facility, but students prefer private hostels with a fee of Rs. 3,500 per month. The canteen facility is available and an alternate option for the food is provided in the canteen. They provide a variety of food items. Our college does not provide sports and medical facilities. There is a school within our...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college and it provides us with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The hostel is very well-maintained and has a good hostel guard. The lab is good. Our college has good sports centers for football and cricket. Our college provides facilities like a canteen, Wi-Fi, a library, etc. The food served in the canteen is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. The hostel is well maintained. It has a good guard. Laboratories are available. We play football and cricket. All facilities, like the canteen, Wi-Fi, and library, are available. The food in the canteen is very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. The hostel was good and food facilities were excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many labs. Our classrooms are spacious, and students can study properly. The library and the ground are good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. The hostel is very well maintained with good hostel guards. It has laboratories and good sports centers like football and cricket. All facilities are available like the canteen, Wi-Fi, and a library. The food served in the canteen is very good and hygienic.

fee_structure.heading: Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

faqs.answer: Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.PharmaCandidate must have completed B.Pharma. or its equivalent degree from a recognised university. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.B.PharmaCandidates must have completed 16 years of Age by the date of commencement of Admissions or on such other date as may be notified by the CET Committee. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

hostel_campus.college_name: Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and infrastructure is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are very flexible, especially in classrooms, labs, and library where students can access and gain knowledge. Hostel facilities are good and the quality of food is just average. Canteen food in our college is very superb.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with qualified faculty members, good infrastructure, and placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and various departments. The college has a library with different books and journals. The college has a broad play ground and bus facilities. The canteen has different items and taste good. A big playground is present in our college.

reviews.review_heading: A brief about my college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent. Facilities are not up to the mark but are okay. The library has a good amount of books organized by branch, year, and course. There is no hostel provided by the college, so students rely on nearby hostels located near the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A brief about my college.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities are the best. Digital classrooms, digital libraries, and free Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are neat and clean. There is no hostel provided by the college, so students rely on hostels located near the college locality. The library has a good amount of books organized by course and year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good for our future, and we can expect more placements this time.
reviews.review_text: We have good facilities like a library, full equipment labs, and neat classrooms. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and I would rate 8 out of 10 for it. It also provides medical facilities like first aid and separate restrooms for girls. Other facilities for girls are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somehow good, and the facilities are good and on time. Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is also a good, comfortable place on our campus. Computer systems and labs are in good working order at times. Weekly, we will play sports. We have the cricket ground, and we have medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The story behind a student in B. Tech college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college needs to be developed a lot. The management should take care of the classes and premises. The Wi-Fi is like a tortoise. The laboratories have decent working computers. The library has a plentiful amount of books and is even separated based on the courses.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty. Good education will be provided.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, sports ground, and canteen are all good. Labs where we practice and receive explanations from our faculty are clean and well-maintained. The canteen area is peaceful, and the food available there is good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college with a lot of memories .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure: The restrooms were not good, and the hostel food was good. The canteen had good infrastructure. Our library also had good infrastructure with all the updated books. Every year, we had sports events like cricket, chess, carrom, kho-kho, and kabaddi. We also had festivals like the traditional day and the annual day.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is helpful, good coding facilities and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are super in the college; the infrastructure is good and the college is coming to develop soon. Wi-Fi is useful only for college purposes. Labs are very poor, classrooms are decent, the library is central and the quality of the food is super in the canteen. Good games and sports are impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Washrooms were not good and the hostel food was good. Canteen had good infrastructure. Our library also had good infrastructure with all the updated books. Every year, we had sports events like cricket, chess, carrom, kho-kho, and kabaddi. We also had fests like traditional day and annual day.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfies because of faculty, really good infrastructure and facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: Our college provide us with good facilities. Our college colleges free Wi-Fi router facility. Our labs are well maintained haviny some new equipment and as well as some old equipments too. And classroom are quite big and around 60-70 students can sit in one class room.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent, and the weather is pleasant. The hostel facilities are good but average for students. Most students learn everything they can about their courses.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with its semester results.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Laboratory is average. Our campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Sports facilities are good. Hostel is also available for both boys and girls. Hostel fee structure is high as compared to other hostels. The food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college life and enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure provided by the management for the students. Good rooms for the students. Better food is provided. Canteen is also good the food depends on the contractors every year. Medical facility is there for the students. Sports and games also encouraged by the management.

Malwa Institute of Science & Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college environment is cool because of our Dean, Mr. Ram Dangi Sir.

review_content.Placements: Around 75 to 85% of students get placed in their dream jobs, and sometimes this increases, reaching 90 to 95%. The highest package offered this year was 16 LPA, and the lowest was 3.2 LPA in the CSE branch. The average package remains near 5 to 6 LPA. Top companies like Genpact, Genesis, TCS, Wipro, Yash Tech, and around 40 to 50 others visit the campus. Last year, about 80 to 85 students got internships in our course, which is the best so far. The top roles offered include frontend dev, full stack, data science, SWE, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, though not the best, but the environment is excellent compared to other colleges. There are many facilities like free WiFi, which is actually very good, well-maintained labs, good classrooms, and a library that is a masterpiece, thanks to a friendly and supportive librarian. Every book is available, and the seating arrangement is great. The college also has an Apple lab. Every year, the college hosts a 15-day sports program where students and faculty play various games like cricket, football, volleyball, table tennis, carrom, and more. The canteen offers awesome food, and the seating is comfortable. Medical facilities are provided, though there is no hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good range of prizes and beneficial for non-JEE students.

review_content.Placements: If I talk about the average percentage of our batch, it ranges from 70% to 85%; almost all the students in my batch have this percentage. For placements and internships, there is no need to have a high percentage for on-campus placement/internship drives unless they specifically ask for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is extremely good; it looks really awesome, and there is also a canteen with good architecture. One thing to note for students coming from outside the city is that they need to arrange their own accommodation because we don't have any hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There was a very beautiful infrastructure in my college. There is no hostel because it has buses from Ujjain to Indore to Depalpur also in Dewas. My college has a Wi-Fi connection and a water purifier. The college has a playground area, indoor games area, sports room, and a swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: The Malwa Institute of science technology is a decent college where you can enjoy your life
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Malwa Institute of science And technology is decent. The college is very clean and have so much greenery in the college. The college does not provide any wifi facility. There is a disappointment for the student because and the canteen and sports facility is super.

reviews.review_heading: Our college environment is cool because of our Dean, Mr. Ram Dangi Sir.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, though not the best, but the environment is excellent compared to other colleges. There are many facilities like free WiFi, which is actually very good, well-maintained labs, good classrooms, and a library that is a masterpiece, thanks to a friendly and supportive librarian. Every book is available, and the seating arrangement is great. The college also has an Apple lab. Every year, the college hosts a 15-day sports program where students and faculty play vari...

reviews.review_heading: Good range of prizes and beneficial for non-JEE students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is extremely good; it looks really awesome, and there is also a canteen with good architecture. One thing to note for students coming from outside the city is that they need to arrange their own accommodation because we don't have any hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty but good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has no hostel facility, no Wi-Fi, and no playground. The classroom and the library are in poor condition. The medical facility for emergency is available. The canteen and medical facilities are poor. Games and events are also conducted by our college and they are provided to students for a good future.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: College has high-quality classrooms and smart classrooms with excellent facilities and well-maintained functional classrooms. Hostels are not available but canteen and sports quality are top-class. Bus facilities are the best and the bus staff is very helpful and decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college looks awesome by infrastructure, but when it comes to studies that are the worst thing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of that college is looking nice and its build quality is also incredible. There is no hostel to stay in for students and in the canteen, this looks awesome but now in some areas it is close I don't know why but it is close. There is one apple lab but they don't allow any students to go there and they lock the lab all the time.

reviews.review_heading: This is best college for B.E computer Science and engineering.
reviews.review_text: The top college in Indore for infrastructure. Bus facility, 24 labs in computer, special apple lab, Best classrooms, and professional library all books are available for free to the students. Canteen, and sports and games available. The medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Malwa Institute of Science & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The Malwa Institute of Science and Technology has a very good and attractive infrastructure. The college was even awarded for the campus infrastructure. The canteen is also good, and the college has two playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that is providing students a better future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very well developed and many types of facilities are available. We have a library, Wi-Fi, labs, an auditorium, playground, and basketball ground. There is a good atmosphere on campus. Hostel facilities provided are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and it provides a good environment and a high number of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Many types of facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, auditorium, playground and basketball court are available on campus. The environment of the college is very good, and many types of game's and sports are held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college with some opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-settled library with an ample number of books. Our college has a dedicated computer lab, along with internet facility and nice classrooms with good environment and newly equipped. Our college has its own sports ground, along with a few sports facilities and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has a marvellous infrastructure and good enough facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, digital labs and apple lab. They provide the best material to study with the updated edition books. Classrooms are clean and comfortable. Food served in the canteen is healthy and delicious, and they offer a different variety every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Malwa Institute of Science & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful to see. Classrooms here are also very modern and smart. Gardens and greenery of our college attract students. The canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and a healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: There are classrooms, libraries, and many other facilities. There are many other hostels available in Indore, and they all are provided with all facilities to students who come from different cites.

faqs.answer: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences, generally abbreviated as JITS, is an engineering institution with its headquarters in the heart of the Telangana city Warangal. It was established in the year 2001 and is affiliated to Osmania University, which is recognized by the All India Council for Technical Education. JITS offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in various fields of engineering and technology coming from different parts of the country. The institute is known well, to date, for having experienced faculties, modern infrastructural facilities, and hands-on training. Over the years, the institute has also maintained a good placement record because many of the students got employed in renowned organizations, making JITS a reliable choice for the quality of engineering education.
faqs.question: Q: Is Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) a known institute?

faqs.answer: No, you can not get admission without TS EAMCET. The basic criteria for admission to BTech at JITS are that the candidate needs to pass class 12th with a minimum of 45% and appear for entrance examinations like TS EAMCET. The total tuition fee for the course is INR 2.4 Lakhs.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission to Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) B.E. / B.Tech course without TS EAMCET?

faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET cutoff varies year after year with the number of applicants and exam trend, and also based on seat availability at the institute. For popular engineering streams like Computer Science and Electronics, it will cut off between 30,000 to 50,000 rank. May be more, for the rest of the branches. However, cut-off ranks vary every year.
faqs.question: Q: What is the TS EAMCET cutoff for Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS)?

faqs.answer: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) offers both UG and PG courses.To get admission in B.Tech the basic eligibility criteria is 10+2 with minimum 45% of marks and the candidate must have appeared in JEE main / TG EAPCET entrance exam. For PG courses such as M.Tech students should have bachelor's degree from a recognised university and student must have appeared in GATE/TS PGECET entrance examination. For the MBA the eligibility criteria is Bachelor's degree from a recognised university+TSICET entrance examination.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) a known institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences, generally abbreviated as JITS, is an engineering institution with its headquarters in the heart of the Telangana city Warangal. It was established in the year 2001 and is affiliated to Osmania University, which is recognized by the All India Council for Technical Education. JITS offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in various fields of engineering and technology coming from different parts of the country. The institute is known well, to date, for having experienced faculties, modern infrastructural facilities, and hands-on training. Over the years, the institute has also maintained a good placement record because many of the students got employed in renowned organizations, making JITS a reliable choice for the quality of engineering education.

overview_faqs.question: Why is Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences is widely known for having a high quality of education and balanced growth in terms of engineering and technology. Since its establishment in 2001, the institution offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs that deliver solid curricula enough to meet requirements and more. JITS is a known household for seasoned faculty, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and modern laboratories that add value to practical learning. The college also possesses a respectable placement record, as it attracts many companies seeking to recruit graduates annually. Besides that, JITS promotes research and innovation for getting students ready for successful careers in every field of engineering and technology.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) good?
overview_faqs.answer: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) is a reputable engineering college:- Established: 2001With assets of NAAC with the accreditation of ‘A’ grade- Approved by AICTE- Affiliated to JNTUH- Campus: 30 acres and other physical facilities and structures measuring up to INR 20 crores.- Student strength of 2,500+- Faculty are 200+, 75% with PG/Ph.D.- Courses offered includes 6 UG, 5 PG programs- Placement rate is 80%- Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL- Average salary package: INR 4-6 lakhs/year- Research publications: 500+- Patents filed: 20+JITS provides proper education, research and employment prospect in different fields.

faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET cutoff varies year after year with the number of applicants and exam trend, and also based on seat availability at the institute. For popular engineering streams like Computer Science and Electronics, it will cut off between 30,000 to 50,000 rank. May be more, for the rest of the branches. However, cut-off ranks vary every year.

courses_data.description: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) offers a full time MBA/PGDM with a duration of 2 years. Admission to this course is based on TSICET scores. For MBA/PGDM, candidates must fulfil the below eligibility criteria: Eligibility Criteria

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) B.E. / B.Tech course without TS EAMCET?
faqs.answer: No, you can not get admission without TS EAMCET. The basic criteria for admission to BTech at JITS are that the candidate needs to pass class 12th with a minimum of 45% and appear for entrance examinations like TS EAMCET. The total tuition fee for the course is INR 2.4 Lakhs.

faqs.question: How to get into Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) for UG/PG courses? What's the eligibility for admission?
faqs.answer: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) offers both UG and PG courses.To get admission in B.Tech the basic eligibility criteria is 10+2 with minimum 45% of marks and the candidate must have appeared in JEE main / TG EAPCET entrance exam. For PG courses such as M.Tech students should have bachelor's degree from a recognised university and student must have appeared in GATE/TS PGECET entrance examination. For the MBA the eligibility criteria is Bachelor's degree from a recognised university+TSICET entrance examination.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS)?
faqs.answer: Yes, You can get private admission in this institute. Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) accepts direct admissions through councelling process for some courses. Students seeking admission in this college may fill the application form from their official website. Though for courses such B.Tech, institute takes admission on the basis of merit of entrance examinations.The basic eligiblity criteria to get admission in this college is to have passed 10+2 with minimum 45% with PCM as it's compulsory subjects.

description: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 83121 and 105319 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round,

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 83121, 88876 and 91520, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS). Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences (JITS) MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 40455. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 41620, and the 2023 cutoff was 43163 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been increasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: There is good study in the college, but some faculty don’t know about the subjects.
reviews.review_text: In labs, computers are there but do not work. There is no hostel on the campus. The canteen is like a storeroom. About sports, there is no clean ground, and no sports are held on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It has friendly lectures and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides good facilities like washrooms, and bed rooms are good. There is 24 hours hot water facility. The hotel food is very tasty and hygienic. The college infrastructure is good. The labs are well-equipped with air-conditioners. Classrooms are neat. There are many books in the library. The medical facilities are good, and Wi-Fi is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for study purpose with nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: Jayamukhi offers good infrastructure for academics with well-equipped labs and classrooms. The college has an average girls' hostel with basic facilities. Currently, there is no boys' hostel available on campus. Average facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, nice college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, and the classrooms are good. The labs are well-equipped. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. We have a huge library. The campus provides hostel facility for both boys and girls. The B.Ed rooms are neat and clean. The food is good. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Jayamukhi: A true temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: On my campus, there is no hostel provision for boys, only for girls the hostel is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, the infrastructure is good and excellent. The classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and the library are available. The only thing is that the hostel is not for boys. The sports period is there in that the coaches or the physical department are responsible for training the students.

reviews.review_heading: Jayamukhi Institute of Technological Sciences: The art of studying.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All facilities are available, like a bus and Wi-Fi. There are excellent labs and e-classrooms. There is clean and good library for students. Hostel is available only for girls, not for boys, good maintenance by the college and hostel management.

reviews.review_heading: Jayamukhi-The legacy of students.
reviews.review_text: The college ambience is good. Wi-Fi is available, e-classes are conducted, and the library is accessible. The hostel is available only for girls, not for boys, with a good warden. The girls in the hostel are friendly, which helps create a calm and positive environment in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It helps students to fly.
reviews.review_text: The college ambience is good. Wi-Fi is available, and e-classrooms are also available. The library is available. There are hostels for only girls and not for boys. It has super wardens. They are very strict and friendly to hostelers at night.

reviews.review_heading: It's not the well college, but it's okay. Within the budget, you can get skills and good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is flawless with a good network signal. Labs are also good, with experienced faculty. Classrooms are slightly comfortable, but some windows have broken glass. The library is excellent. Actually, the hostel is only for girls, there is no hostel for boys.

reviews.review_heading: Need to improve college environment and extra circular activities.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms, labs, and library are well furnished and maintained, and have the latest equipment and editions. The quality of food in the canteen and hostel is average, not very good. The gym and sports room are available for college hostel students to use at no cost.

reviews.review_heading: Beyond the classroom and college reality.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at this college are really good. The libraries have a lot of useful books, and the labs are well-equipped. In addition, there are classrooms, lecture halls, recreational space, student centers, technology and computing facilities, and art and cultural facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Well qualified faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: There were many such facilities in the college, such as Wi-Fi access that was available. We had classrooms for all the classes, and the labs were well managed and organized with good-quality chairs. There were all kinds of devices and PCs for us to operates on we could get hands-on experience. I don't live in a hostel because I live in my house.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and great facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has decent facilities; Wi-Fi is reliable, labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are spacious. The library is good for research. Hostels are okay; rooms are clean but can get crowded. The food is average, but the canteen offers better options. Medical facilities are basic, and sports options are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2023. good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: A 40-acre campus consists of a good environment and Wi-Fi facilities. Our campus consists of labs for all departments. We also provide hostel facilities for girls. The hostel has so many facilities. Our college also schedules sports in our schedule and also encourages sports.
