highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Mookambigai College of Engineering (MCE Keeranur) admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mookambigai College of Engineering (MCE Keeranur) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the Mookambigai College of Engineering (MCE Keeranur) programmes is around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall best place to gain knowledge and will get best experience .

review_content.Placements: I must mention about the placements happening in our college, the training and placement department is striving really hard and they make sure that almost every students of the college gets placed before completing the graduation which helps the students to start and build their career.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is based on recent designs. It has all the basic facilities and equipment. There are labs, Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports etc. The surrounding is all clean and well maintained. The food in canteen is of great quality and as per the genuine rate.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the management.

review_content.Placements: No placements are provided in the college. No student from 2018 batch got placed on campus because only BPO companies visited the college. Students of my batch are not interested in it. Some consultancies also visit the college every year. They offer jobs to the students on campus, but they ask for money when students approach them after the course. Many of my seniors got placed in some companies, but they were ignored when they reached the office. Some of my seniors who passed out in 2017 were placed in Della Pvt. Ltd. The college management asks the fee for placement and training, but nobody gets placed. Students are paying nearly Rs. 25,000 as the placement training fee.

review_summary.college_name: Mookambigai College of Engineering (MCE Keeranur) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good placements.

content.Placements: It was the best engineering college in Pudukkottai district. Around 100% of placements are provided every year. All the students got good jobs on campus. The lowest salary offered was Rs.20,000 per month and the highest salary package was 1 LPM.
content.Infrastructure: It was the biggest college with a very good infrastructure. Many classrooms were available with air-conditioners. There were multi-specialty laboratories. Hostel facility was very good. Canteen and mess served a variety of food items.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is 6 LPA, the average package is 2.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, TVs, Royal Enfield etc. Above 70% of students got internships in TVs. Supervisor, junior engineer, etc., roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are really good. There are 2 labs in our college. It is really good, and the library atmosphere is just amazing. In my hostel canteen, they provide non-veg foods like mutton, prawns and fish on Wednesdays and Saturdays.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall best place to gain knowledge and will get best experience .

content.Placements: I must mention about the placements happening in our college, the training and placement department is striving really hard and they make sure that almost every students of the college gets placed before completing the graduation which helps the students to start and build their career.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is based on recent designs. It has all the basic facilities and equipment. There are labs, Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports etc. The surrounding is all clean and well maintained. The food in canteen is of great quality and as per the genuine rate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the management.

content.Placements: No placements are provided in the college. No student from 2018 batch got placed on campus because only BPO companies visited the college. Students of my batch are not interested in it. Some consultancies also visit the college every year. They offer jobs to the students on campus, but they ask for money when students approach them after the course. Many of my seniors got placed in some companies, but they were ignored when they reached the office. Some of my seniors who passed out in 2017 were placed in Della Pvt. Ltd. The college management asks the fee for placement and training, but nobody gets placed. Students are paying nearly Rs. 25,000 as the placement training fee.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college, and don't expect much.

content.Placements: The placements are not offered for our seniors. By means of core jobs, there are no placements. They offered salesman jobs for an automobile engineer in car showrooms, and whether it is useful for their future and is there is any growth in their career. The highest salary package was 1.2 LPA. Anyone could get a sales job in automobile showrooms, but they arranged a group called Autogurukul to get this job. There are no internships. They conducted placement training during our final year only and also it is not useful. They think that sales and service jobs are the biggest platforms for an automobile engineer. We can evaluate their skills by means of this example.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: It was the biggest college with a very good infrastructure. Many classrooms were available with air-conditioners. There were multi-specialty laboratories. Hostel facility was very good. Canteen and mess served a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are really good. There are 2 labs in our college. It is really good, and the library atmosphere is just amazing. In my hostel canteen, they provide non-veg foods like mutton, prawns and fish on Wednesdays and Saturdays.

reviews.review_heading:
Overall best place to gain knowledge and will get best experience
.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is based on recent designs. It has all the basic facilities and equipment. There are labs, Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports etc. The surrounding is all clean and well maintained. The food in canteen is of great quality and as per the genuine rate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the management.
reviews.review_text: In the year 2017, Jio-Fi was installed in the campus and hostels. Earlier, Wi-Fi facility was available only in the staff rooms and labs. Classrooms are the worst because all the buildings are old, and the ceilings are in typical. Labs are spacious and neat, but all the instruments are old. One of the best facilities in the college is its library. Medical facilities are not available in the college. Students are taken to Keeranur G. Hospital in an emergency case. The management doesn't encourage...

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, and don't expect much.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available. The labs are the worst. Most of our laboratory sessions are free hours. In our batch, lateral entry students know something about it, and they will teach us. The staff members also teach us. There is no importance for sports. Iron desks are placed in classrooms. The quality is average. In hostels, the only issue is water and cleanliness of restrooms, and everything is good. The hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Worthless and Fit for nothing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is cheap. We don't even have proper and clean restrooms for both day scholars and hostlers. And I as a hosteller would give no stars to the facilities. Because the first-year hostel was okay but remaining 3 years of the hostel was a disaster. There was no water for toilets. Very unclean mess facilities and food preparations were also the same.

reviews.review_heading: The worst ever engineering college in Tamil Nadu. Please don't prefer this college.
reviews.review_text: According to the infrastructure, my college is fully equipped with the lab in all the courses. The interesting part is even the lab assistants have enough knowledge than our professors. My college is now 50 years old. They built around two new blocks during my course period. Still, they are in construction period alone. The worst part of my college infrastructure is the hostel and restrooms are poor in maintenance. Due to poor maintenance of the restrooms, I had health issues like urinal infecti...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in our city, established 25 years ago.
reviews.review_text: Primarily, our college doesn't give importance to sports. The infrastructure of the college is old. The campus and hostel are connected to a high-speed Wi-Fi network. Classrooms and labs are not equipped with the latest equipment. Many books are available in the library which is also very huge. The canteen present in the campus provides good food and a full meal for just Rs.30. Girls hostel rooms are clean, but boy’s rooms are very dirty and worst.

reviews.review_heading: Choose if you have no other choice.
reviews.review_text:
The labs are better when compared to other colleges in the region. The computers are well-maintained, but the usage of pen-drives and other such devices is not advisable as the computers are inflicted with many viruses. 
Wi-Fi is available inside the hostel premises. But it cannot be used during the college hours by the students as it is password-protected. However, free Wi-Fi is available during the morning hours for around 30 minutes. 
The library is worth mentioning as there are plenty of boo...

reviews.review_heading: Success is always given by Mookambigai.
reviews.review_text: It has a large area of land with a huge entrance platform. A green environment is observed here. Separate office waiting facility. Wide computer lab. A separate block is available for the machine lab and the electrical and electronics lab. There is also a wide lecture hall, a good canteen facility, and a large size library. Thus, it has a good infrastructure.

The college has a well-equipped library, labs, and transport facility. Equal weight age is given to sports and extra weight to the sport and extracurricular activities apart from academics. The college also provides a separate hostel for boys and girls. This year around 350 students was placed in different companies. The college has a well-equipped library, labs, and transport facility. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is good to join this college.

review_content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placed in our college. The highest package offered is 4.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered in our college is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies hire students from our college. 80 percent of students got internships from our college in all companies. All roles are offered in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is good. It has a smartboard. Classrooms are clean and good. We can study in our library to understand any questions. There are food facilities in our hostel. The quality of food is good. The mess and canteen are clean. Medical facilities are good. It has sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am really disappointed with placements in my college.

review_content.Placements: Over 70 percent of students got placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 7.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys and Tech Mahindra. No students received internships. Most roles offered are SDE and testing positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are not good. But there is a library and decent classrooms. Hostel is available but expensive. College has no grounds and lacks good-quality sports facilities.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. All of them are qualified. I don't think so they make the students industry-ready. It's difficult to pass exams. Pass percentage is around 60. Teachers are indeed helpful, and all of them are well-qualified in their respective fields. Their guidance, support, and expertise play a significant role in shaping a student's understanding of the subjects. Teachers are always approachable and willing to clarify doubts, which makes learning easier and more effective. They also provide a structured learning environment and try to ensure that students grasp both the theoretical and practical aspects of their coursework.

review_summary.college_name: Malla Reddy Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied as the faculty and facilities are bad.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students got placed from my course. There were placements, but none of our seniors got jobs, and the placements were held in other colleges. There were many companies, but as for now, none of them have more than 20 percent done internships, and most of these internships are outside the campus, they are done by students themself, no faculty has helped them in developing their skills.
content.Infrastructure: Labs have many effective pieces of equipment. Classrooms are good, they are cleaned every day. Facilities like sports and gym are not available after we finished 1st year, one of our buildings is merged with another college beside us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of placements and no proper fests/events.

content.Placements: About 4 percent of students got placement in Genpact and Cognizant, and the average package offered Is 3.4 LPA. Less than 2 percent of students got internships in service-based companies, which are usually startups. Students are offered roles in backend development and web development.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, we had good infrastructure and facilities for students and staff members. The library and computer/chemistry labs are well maintained. The quality of food is average in the canteen. When it comes to sports, we had a big playground with a kabbadi court, cricket pitch, volleyball court, and indoor games like table tennis, carrom, and chess. The gym was one of the best in the college, which helped students in building physical fitness.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is good to join this college.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placed in our college. The highest package offered is 4.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered in our college is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies hire students from our college. 80 percent of students got internships from our college in all companies. All roles are offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is good. It has a smartboard. Classrooms are clean and good. We can study in our library to understand any questions. There are food facilities in our hostel. The quality of food is good. The mess and canteen are clean. Medical facilities are good. It has sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am really disappointed with placements in my college.

content.Placements: Over 70 percent of students got placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 7.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys and Tech Mahindra. No students received internships. Most roles offered are SDE and testing positions.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are not good. But there is a library and decent classrooms. Hostel is available but expensive. College has no grounds and lacks good-quality sports facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. All of them are qualified. I don't think so they make the students industry-ready. It's difficult to pass exams. Pass percentage is around 60. Teachers are indeed helpful, and all of them are well-qualified in their respective fields. Their guidance, support, and expertise play a significant role in shaping a student's understanding of the subjects. Teachers are always approachable and willing to clarify doubts, which makes learning easier and more effective. They also provide a structured learning environment and try to ensure that students grasp both the theoretical and practical aspects of their coursework.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Malla Reddy Institute of Technology and Science.

content.Placements: The percentage of getting placement for my course is 90 per cent. The highest package offered is 28 Lacs, and the average package offered is 8 Lacs. Too many companies are recruiting like Wipro, Infosys, Google, Microsoft, and Amazon. The percentage of getting an internship is 75 per cent.
content.Infrastructure: College facilities are good, and all department block facilities are good. The college provides Wi-Fi, labs are very advanced, classrooms are good, and the library has all types of books. Hostel facilities are good, like the food and mess are like home food. In total, four canteens are there. Good medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are not good. But there is a library and decent classrooms. Hostel is available but expensive. College has no grounds and lacks good-quality sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Malla Reddy Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: College facilities are good, and all department block facilities are good. The college provides Wi-Fi, labs are very advanced, classrooms are good, and the library has all types of books. Hostel facilities are good, like the food and mess are like home food. In total, four canteens are there. Good medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college good placements .
reviews.review_text: Not that good infrastructure. The classrooms are ok, all are well equipped, but not working. No proper classroom maintenance in summer, and no proper ventilation. All the branches are clumsy in one small area, the labs are well designed, but only some of the labs are meeting today's needs of software.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members are the best in our college.
reviews.review_text: I am absolutely satisfied with the facilities available in the college, like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, a library, free Wi-Fi, bus facilities, an auditorium, seminar halls, ventilated classrooms, etc. The quality of the facilities available in the hostel was excellent, with well-organized rooms. There was variety of food in the canteen and mess at reasonable prices. Medical facilities were also good, providing services on time. Sports were played in the in...

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for bright placements and future.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college was great, and the college was spread over 40 acres of land. Facilities like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, a library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, libraries, ventilated classrooms, a bus transportation, a project, labs, an auditorium, etc. Hostel management was providing many good facilities like a neat and hygienic environment in the rooms, tasty food in the mess and canteen with reasonable prices. Sports and games are u...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best for infrastructure and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college is the best in terms of infrastructure and facilities, like good classrooms, Wi-Fi facility, a big library, and labs for every department in the college. In our college, there are separate blocks for each department. The college provides hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The quality of food in the canteen and hostel mess is excellent. The college provides free medical facilities at any time. The college has all ways of transportation. The college has good sports grounds for ...

reviews.review_heading: It has a balanced campus life with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a good library with a wide range of books. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and regular maintenance. The mess provides average food, but the canteen has better options. Medical facilities are available on campus with a health center. The campus also includes playgrounds and indoor games for students to relax and stay active.

reviews.review_heading: I’m not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very poor. Compared to the college, the facilities in the hostel are good. The quality of food is okay in the mess and canteen. There are no sports and games in the college. Classroom infrastructure is very poor, as is the college surroundings.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but less placements and no internships.
reviews.review_text: I think my college provides all the basic facilities and infrastructure, like good Wi-Fi in labs and quality books in the library. In the hostel, they provide rooms with five beds and attached bathrooms. The food is good. For sports, there is a big playground. The medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is okay when you want good standards.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were okay, and the mess food was average. Sports grounds were maintained, and indoor games were available. The medical room was basic but functional, and the canteen food was decent. In our free time, we had good enough college facilities to explore, like a gym, indoor games, and Wi-Fi throughout the college.

reviews.review_heading: MRITS CSE experience - Good college but needs upgrades.
reviews.review_text: MRITS had a decent campus with modern labs, a spacious library, and Wi-Fi (though patchy). Classrooms were well-equipped, but hostels needed upgrades. The canteen and sports facilities were average, but the peer group made it fun.

reviews.review_heading: A good place to learn new things.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, and the atmosphere in the hostel is also good. I have not seen it basically, but I have heard it from my friends. Talking about the college infrastructure, it is very well constructed, with a big ground, and classrooms are also very well maintained.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Vaigai College of Engineering admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    Vaigai College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college because of faculty members and good placements in 2023.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students get placements in our college. Computer science students are placed more. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. A lot of construction companies recruit students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It is a well-spaced college. Wi-Fi is provided for Naan Mudhalvan online class, which is conducted every Friday by the government.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members in our college are caring and well-educated. They teach us like in a school. They teach us the entire syllabus. They teach apart from studies like life management and plans. They provide study materials for our exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good faculty members and promising management.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 75% of students are placed in their core as well as its companies. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Technoneo, HCL, Vishal constructions. Students are provided with good leadership roles while learning.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer laboratories are provided with free Wi-Fi for students' welfare and other departments' laboratories are provided with their necessary laboratory equipment. College hostels are there near the campus with a good canteen. Sports facilities are not good in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best for those who are ready to attempt the GATE exam.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate of our college is almost 75%. Most of the students studying in our college are trained for campus interviews and they are ready to attend the interviews, but some of them are selected for the job. So placements in our college are good but not the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a huge ground for students to showcase their talents. It provides good Wi-Fi facility around the campus. There is a vehicle parking space in our college. But there are no bus facilities for the students to commute from various places.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fire Technology and Industrial Safety Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placement every year.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in this course. The highest package was approximately 3.4 LPA. There were several companies like Zinc and many companies. Approximately 70% of students got internships in several companies as a safety officer. It depends on our percentage and our experience.
content.Infrastructure: There were many types of facilities provided by college like training sessions. There were lab, Wi-Fi, and library. The classroom was very good, neat, and clean.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were very helpful. They were very supportive. They always encourage us. This course curriculum was relevant. It made the students ready for industries and companies. It depends on our study. The pass percentage was above 40 percent. Mock drills taught us how to do our job, and every teacher explained their experiences. Our director, principal, and teachers were very supportive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Don’t aim for this college, it is the worst college ever.

content.Placements: There are 60 students enrolled in the BBA program. There are no top recruiting companies for my course. The overall undergraduate placement rate is around 60% (likely across all UG courses, including BBA). The broad consensus is that the course is relevant and aims to prepare students for the real world. It is described as "industry ready" and built with future applications in mind.
content.Infrastructure: There is not that much good infrastructure. They have a library and classrooms. According to one student review, internships (with a stipend of 6-7K/month) are available in the senior year, though specific companies aren’t named. It does not have a high recommendation from the students.

admission_overview.college_name: Pacific University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application, Last Date

admission_process.title: Pacific University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pacific University admissions2025are based on merit as well as different entrance exam scores. Pacific University offers over 140 undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), Certificate, Diploma, & doctoral courses across 19 departments including Engineering, Management, Dentistry, Pharmacy, Computer Application, and Hotel Management, etc. To get admission to the university, candidates can fill out the application form in both online & offline modes.

Before applying, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the eligibility criteria for their desired programme. Admission to UG programs, such as BCA, BSc are based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Some popular courses offered by Pacific University along with their eligibility criteria and selection criteria are listed below:
Course Name

Pacific University admission process include registration, selection and admission confirmation. The selection criteria vary course-wise at the university. Candidates seeking admission can check below the steps to get a seat in Pacific University:
STEP 1: Pacific University Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for their preferred course. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,250 to register for a course. The application process include filling out of details, document submission and fee payment.
STEP 2: Pacific University Selection 2025

Applicants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for some of the courses. For programmes such as BTech, BPharm, MBA, etc., admissions are based on national-level entrance exams. The university accepts CAT, MAT, ATMA, JEE Main, GPAT, etc.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment 2025
Once selected, candidates will receive an offer letter. Shortlisted aspirants are then required to pay a course fee to confirm their seats.

There has been a notable increase in the number of offers extended by each company, with the average compensation experiencing a remarkable rise of 21.18% compared to the previous year. reviews_list.review_title: Quick review about GEC Bidar.

review_content.Placements: We are the second batch of our course at this college. There are no signs of having placements here as the college is tier 3. But if any of the companies come to our campus they may offer posts in IT field related to our course which is AI and this.
review_content.Infrastructure: We do not have an open library but they have a building specifically for the library. There is no ground so none of the sports are playable on the college campus. The college does not have a Wi-Fi facility but is mentioned to be a Wi-Fi-enabled campus college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computers Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college life and its feature.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not yet started as the college does not have any batch in the final year. We as students are trying to have internships. As we are pursuing CSE (computer science and engineering) we can have roles as software engineering and others in the tech field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has registered itself as Wi-Fi enabled campus. But there is no Wi-Fi available in the area. Library has not yet opened but a new building has been constructed for it. All the classrooms and labs are well-ventilated and have a lot of free space.

review_content.Placements: Our Government Engineering College started around 2 years ago and there is no placement record till now. As there is none of the batches passed out yet. But there are chances of the company visit by the next year as said by our placement coordinator.

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computers Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely worth it for the money. If your rank is good, opt for better colleges outside Bidar.

content.Placements: Actually, our college was opened in the year 2022, so no batch has graduated. In 2026, the first batch of this college will be graduating. As the college is good, it is believed and expected that placement will take place, and good companies will come to our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Classes are big and good, and the benches are sturdy and of good quality. Projectors are present in every classroom, and green boards are also present. Labs have high-quality systems. Wi-Fi is not accessible for students. The library has a good number of books. Everything is new. The hostel is good. The canteen is currently not available; a new building for the canteen has been constructed, but has not yet been inaugurated. Sports are not available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computers Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and value for money. Best government college in the Bidar area.

content.Placements: Currently, no batch has yet been placed. As our college has opened in the year 2022, still no batch has been graduated yet. Next year i.e., 2026 the first batch will graduate and we can look forward to placements in the upcoming year. As our college is based on government, we are hoping many government companies will come for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: This is an awesome college, the infrastructure is more worth it than the fees you put in. We have high-quality benches and larger classrooms, and each classroom has a green board as well as whiteboards for projector display. There are cameras in every classroom. We have filter water available at free of cost daily. Labs have quality systems. Each CPU in our labs is worth more than Rs. 50,000. Canteen and library are constructed new, but still not open. But for the freshers, there is canteen and library. No sports are available for now.

reviews.review_heading: All you should know about government engineering college, Bidar.
reviews.review_text: The campus is well-spaced with all working labs, but we don't have any ground in our college. The hostel is also good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and has a new building with a library and canteen. The campus is well-equipped with drinking water on every floor.

reviews.review_heading: Worth more than the fee. Infrastructure, labs, etc., are excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well and good. As compared to the colleges in Bidar, this is the best. The syllabus is absolutely the same as the nearby college GND, so instead of spending money on private colleges. This college would be a solid choice. Hostel is only for boys, and it's a combined one, which means all the other students can apply for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied by joining this college.
reviews.review_text: A good hostel is available near the college campus. The food is also okay for students. A variety of food is given to students daily like morning breakfast, afternoon lunch, and evening dinner. It also provides a tea in the evening at 5 PM. The hostel rooms are satisfying.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and dissatisfied with the management.

review_content.Placements: In our college, we are the first batch of mechanical engineering course. There are only 60 students in the first batch. There are a lot of top recruiting companies for our course, but students never get offers from them. Only some below-average companies visit our college for on-campus placements. The top role offered in our course was a design engineer because they provided additional designing course. Some students don't have to give donations, so the salary package offered would be around Rs. 80,000 per year. But companies ask some students for donation, and they have to pay around 1.5 lacs nearly. In our college, during our tenure, we never got an internship through our college. However, we got internships with the help of some good staff members and their guidance.

faqs.answer: St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology are B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 2.6 by students. review_summary.college_name: St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good education and friendly staff.

content.Placements: Around 50% or fewer students were placed from our course. Many students secured internships in various companies. Top roles offered in our course were related to research field. About 75% of students secured internships and the lowest salary package offered in our course was 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available for our course is really good. They have a well-equipped lab with instruments and chemicals. We have free access to use and learn whenever we want. The quality of hostel is good and the food quality is nice but the taste is okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely a good college.

content.Placements: St. michael college of engineering and technology is one of the best engineering colleges. Placements were very good. Every year, above 95% students got placed in reputed companies. This college conducts so many campus interviews. Salary offered is around 20000-50000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was very nice. Full campus had CCTV camera facility. Departments, laboratories, and library were available at this college. Hostels were very good. Sports grounds and coaching staff were available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were experienced people and they were highly qualified. They taught very well. Every week, model tests were conducted. They conducted extra curricular activities and programs too. Industry visits were arranged. 95% students passed in all exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is average in placements but excellent in teaching.

content.Placements: The placement record of this college is average and quite low in past years. Only a few students got placements in good companies with top roles, but most of the students fail to get placed in top companies. So, the placement results are average, but in future, it will change.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is above average. However, the infrastructure of the library is excellent, and it is one of the biggest libraries. But the infrastructure of the hostel is quite low as compared to the infrastructure of the college and library.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and dissatisfied with the management.

content.Placements: In our college, we are the first batch of mechanical engineering course. There are only 60 students in the first batch. There are a lot of top recruiting companies for our course, but students never get offers from them. Only some below-average companies visit our college for on-campus placements. The top role offered in our course was a design engineer because they provided additional designing course. Some students don't have to give donations, so the salary package offered would be around Rs. 80,000 per year. But companies ask some students for donation, and they have to pay around 1.5 lacs nearly. In our college, during our tenure, we never got an internship through our college. However, we got internships with the help of some good staff members and their guidance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Life encourages and discourages you all the time, so don't be unmoved.

content.Placements: The placements are not good on the campus, and it is all in your hand. Improve your skills and get placed in off-campus. Here, they only offer startup company placements, so try to get a better job. Designed placement companies in their profile are fake on the campus. Think advanced about your future during your studies.
content.Infrastructure: Good laboratory facilities are available on the campus, and one should use them in a decent manner with knowledgeable skills. The hostel, sports, and all are good.
content.Faculty: The teaching is also good. I can't say negative feedback about teaching staff. The college management is the only major drawback. The faculty members of every department take their responsibility for their teaching. They did their excellent teaching for their earnings. The course is good in the way of theoretical but didn't gain any knowledge practically. Overall, the practical experience is zero when you complete your degree.

reviews.review_text: The college is spread over the vast land, but the infrastructure is very poor. There are no proper classrooms, and they keep changing it. The labs are just for the sake of evaluation by authorities. Apart from that, we don't use them for anything, it is horrible. There is no proper playground and proper restroom in the college. The hostel mess and canteen food are horrible.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of college facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the above-mentioned facilities are there. But the quality of labs and classrooms is very poor. They are designed in such a way that all the instruments in the lab are working, but only one or two instruments will be properly working. For a batch of 60 students, the experiments have to be done with 3 - 4 equipment and some of the students didn't get time to complete the experiments due to the shortage of equipment. Food quality is poor and the kitchen itself is not maintained properly. Hostel...

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfaction about the Faculty, College campus and Placement.
reviews.review_text: Its green campus with well-equipped Wi-Fi, laboratories and research center. Centralized library was there with Remote access. IIC cell for students development. With 2000 seats auditorium. Hostels with Wi-Fi facilities for both boys and girls with all states food.

content.Placements: About 80% of students from our college get placed. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering, Kallooppara.

content.Placements: From the 6th semester onwards we are eligible for campus placements. Many top-notch companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc., offer placements in our college. The average salary package offered is around 2 LPA. In the previous year, around 40% of students got placed in campus recruitments.
content.Infrastructure: When we talk about infrastructure, the college provides all the basic infrastructure and facilities that usually have in a college. We cannot expect a campus and classroom like western universities but provides a clean and homely atmosphere. Our hostel provides almost all the facilities that a typical Indian hostel provides. Meals are not that much great, but the quantity and variety are appreciable. The registration process is at the college itself, and hotel fees are affordable than else ware so the fee for a month including food is around Rs. 2500.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions, Datia offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions, Datia offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Pharma and PG Diploma. Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions, Datia fee structure for all the courses is around INR 38,000 to 1,10,000.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Toppers, Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, and Byju's are the top recruiting companies. About 60% of students got internships in Toppers company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are so cool and clean. The best instruments are available in the lab. The quality of food is very good in our canteen.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable. They are well-behaved. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult. If you have to study properly, you can easily clear the semester exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions.

review_content.Placements: It is a good college but needs a lot of improvement in placements and facilities. Our college was working on it. Small companies recruited students of our college with an average salary package of 3.2 LPA. The highest salary package offered in CS was 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility was provided at a far place which is not convenient. Hostel life was good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were new and well-qualified but needed to work a lot to improve. The course curriculum was fully organised by RGPV, so the subjects were run by them. Our college followed the same procedure as every college in Madhya Pradesh.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: Few students are placed; some students are placed only through self-study or hard work; if you rely on a college, you will never get a job, and some companies hire but pay a very low salary, so think twice before enrolling in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very poor, Wi-Fi is not good, speeds are very low, and there are many network issues in classrooms, even though our data is not working well. Labs are also not good. There is a library, but it is mostly closed and all books are old. It is also not good in canteens; not all of the food that is mentioned there is available, and the quality is very poor.

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.
faqs.question: Q: Why do nurses fail Nursing classes?

overview_faqs.question: How is the scope of microbiology?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -1. Biomedical scientist2. Bio technologist3. Clinical research associate4. Food technologist5. Healthcare scientist, immunology6. Medicinal chemist7. Microbiologist8. Nano technologist.

reviews.review_text: Classrooms are so cool and clean. The best instruments are available in the lab. The quality of food is very good in our canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was provided at a far place which is not convenient. Hostel life was good.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very poor, Wi-Fi is not good, speeds are very low, and there are many network issues in classrooms, even though our data is not working well. Labs are also not good. There is a library, but it is mostly closed and all books are old. It is also not good in canteens; not all of the food that is mentioned there is available, and the quality is very poor.

college_info.intro:
Rungta International Skills University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. A lot of Engineering courses are provided in collaboration with IBM, Google, and various other companies. BTech students can become Engineers, Data Scientists, or go for various other job profiles. BTech students are offered 100% placement assistance and are trained before sitting for the interviews. Some of the USPs of the popular programmes offered by the Rungta International Skills University are mentioned below:
Rungta Student Development Centres have been established to make students job-ready by enhancing their skills and upgrading their knowledge
Below mentioned are some of the Rungta International Skills University courses and their respective eligibility and Rungta International Skills University fee:

placements.overview: Rungta International Skills University placements 2025 will be updated here once out. The university is visited by top companies for placements such as Google, Goldman Sachs, L&T, Bosch, SAP, Virtusa, and others. Rungta International Skills University concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest placement report, the highest and average packages offered during Rungta International Skills University placements in 2025 stood at INR 38 LPA and INR 6.5 LPA, respectively. Further, over 250 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and offered over 3,000 jobs to the students of the 2025 batch.

faqs.answer: Rungta International Skills University admissions are currently open for all courses. Candidates are selected for courses based on entrance exam scores as per course requirements. faqs.question: Q: Are Rungta International Skills University admissions open?

faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can enrol for the BTech course at Rungta International Skills University through the JEE Main entrance exam score. Candidates from states other than Chhattisgarh who wish to pursue a BTech course at this university must have valid JEE Main entrance exam scores. Admission is carried out through Online Counselling conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), Govt of Chhattisgarh. The Counselling is based on the marks obtained in Class 12 and the score obtained in the Joint Entrance Examination - Main (JEE Main) at the National Level.

admission_overview.college_name: Rungta International Skills University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application Process

admission_overview.title: Rungta International Skills University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Rungta International Skills University admission 2025 is open for all courses. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BPharma, MTech, MBA, etc. Apart from undergraduate and postgraduate courses, the university also offers Diploma and PhD courses. The flagship programmes available at this university include BTech and BSc. The selection criteria are entrance-based or merit-based, as per the course requirement. RISU admits students through the Chhattisgarh State Quota, Other State Quota, Management Quota, and Sponsored Quota. However, the selection criteria for each course have slight variations. The application process at Rungta International Skills University is conducted online. Read the article to know more about Rungta International Skills University course admission 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: Rungta International Skills University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: RISU admissions are based on entrance exams or merit-based, as per course requirements. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular Rungta International Skills University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with a 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for the reserve category)
courses_table.selection_criteria: -Online Counselling conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), Govt. of Chhattisgarh/CG PET (Chhattisgarh State Quota) -Online Counselling conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), Govt. of Chhattisgarh/JEE Main (Other State Quota) - Merit/Pre-Engineering Test/JEE Main (Management Quota)

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a 50% aggregate for the General Category (45% for the reserve category)
B.E./ BTech (Civil Branch): 50% aggregate, For Reserve Category (SC/ST/OBC/Divyang) - B.E./ BTech (Civil Branch): 45% aggregate

courses_table.selection_criteria: GPAT + Online Counselling -Merit-based for Sponsored Quota

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for admission at Rungta International Skills University?

faqs.answer: RISU admission to various courses is based on merit and scores in the course-specific entrance exam. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Students can check the detailed eligibility criteria for some of the courses:Course NameEligibilityBTechClass 12 with a 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for the reserve category)BBAClass 12 with a 45% aggregateBCAClass 12 with a 45% aggregateMBAGraduation with a 50% aggregate for the General Category (45% for the reserve category)MTechB.E./ BTech (Civil Branch): 50% aggregate, For Reserve Category (SC/ST/OBC/Divyang) - B.E./ BTech (Civil Branch): 45% aggregateMPharmaBPharma with a 55% aggregate
faqs.question: Who are eligible for Rungta International Skills University?

admission_process.title: Rungta International Skills University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rungta International Skills University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Rungta International Skills University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Rungta International Skills University Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://admission.rungta.ac.in/. The application fee is INR 1,500. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores, such as CG PET/JEE Mains/MAT/XAT, etc, for admission to various courses such as BTech, MBA, among others. Post selection criteria, students must visit the university campus for the counselling process. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theRungta International Skills University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to BTech at Rungta International Skills University?
faqs.answer: To enroll in a BTech course at Rungta International Skills University candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers full-time BTech courses lasting four years. Students are selected based on entrance exam. In addition to the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Are admissions to BTech at Rungta International Skills University entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Admission to BTech course is based on entrance at Rungta International Skills University. BTech full form is Bachelor of Technology,  an engineering degree course at the undergraduate level spanning 4 years, which is divided into 8 semesters. B Tech is a professional programme that deals with computers and technology and teaches students about the foundational concepts of computer programming, software, and hardware.

placement_data.title: Rungta International Skills University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rungta International Skills University concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report the placement rate recorded was 95%. The highest and average packages offered during Rungta International Skills University placements in 2025 stood at INR 28 LPA and INR 6.5 LPA , respectively. In all 134 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and gave job opportunities to over 2500 students. The top recruiters of Rungta International Skills University in 2025 included Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Goldman Sachs, L&T, Bosch, SAP, Virtusa, Mahindra, Accenture, Amdocs, etc.

At SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur), students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.

Some of the popular SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) programmes are B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma, etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) admissions:

reviews.review_text: The building is not constructed well enough to be considered a good university but there is a basic model of infrastructure that colleges need. When it comes to hostel, the management is least bothered about the hostel and everyone is focused on making a profit out of it. Labs are well-equipped and has updated systems or computers.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good campus with the best and most supporting teachers.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge library with many books of different editions and authors. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the library. Students can use computers in the library for their research and study. Classrooms are very good with projectors in each class. Hostels are also good with much taking caring wardens and staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is quite good, but some teaching faculty members are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Facilities like hostel food and canteen are rated up to 4 out of 10. In the library, there is no Wi-Fi, and they are just providing ethernet connectivity with around 30 PCs for the whole college in which the total number of students in college around 2,000.

reviews.review_heading: The college and our faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Although there are many labs with good equipment, lecturers are not able to teach well. A few of the instruments in FM Lab got damaged, but our staff members don't pay any attention to that issue.

reviews.review_heading: The best teacher and the best ecosystem.
reviews.review_text: The college had a playground, garden, and a hostel within the campus. Different food items were also available in the canteen, and they had a mess inside the canteen. After eating in the mess, I went to my room. The room was very big. There was a 24-hour water supply inside the hostel. Functions were also organized.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and teaching at an affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the hostel. They provide food and medical facilities. The hostel is highly secured.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for middle-class family students.
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is built at a very lovely place, and it is well-connected by road. There are various facilities like labs for every subject and free Wi-Fi facility. There is a clean library. The hostel is the 2nd home for every student, so I like hostel and food made by local aunties. Medical facilities are provided by good doctors at any time. There is a huge field for games like cricket, football, etc.

college_info.college_name: SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur)

data.description: Everything said about the faculty, as it is generally perceived, is true. They are skilled employees from SIET Bijapur, with an emphasis on dynamic teacher-student interaction. As the institution is very keen on building a strong academic foundation, the professors there have a combination of qualifications and extensive experience in all engineering domains. They are approachable and care about the student learning experience. Teaching infrastructures are exquisite, with most of the classrooms being smart ones paired with current-day teaching instruments to bring forth the best to the learner. Most of the faculty members are involved in research works and academic projects, thereby enhancing the whole education experience. Overall, however, quality and effectiveness in teaching greatly depend on each professor and department.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Sri Krishna College of Engineering admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    Sri Krishna College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

faqs.answer: A:    Sri Krishna College of Engineering offers Degree courses including 6 UG course. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent teaching, strong placements, great infrastructure & facilities but very few fests.

review_content.Placements: 70 percent of students are placed. Packages range from 6 LPA to 24 LPA. Top recruiters include Cognizant, Zoho, and Solidtron. Solidtron recruited around 30 percent of students. Most offers were internships without specific job roles. Very good placements are granted here.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are nearly 10 labs available for our course and classrooms with smart board technology. The biggest library in the city is available in our college. Hostel facilities are awesome, food is excellent, and 24/7 medical facility is available inside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: When I was studying, it was a startup college, so no recognition.

review_content.Placements: We have passed out in 2013. No core company came for campus. Only BPOs came. I'm in a core industry also. Marketing offers only came for us from good companies. Almost EEE and ECE, students were placed in good companies but civil and mechanical students did not get good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: When I studied, we were the first batch student passed out from the startup college. Still constructions were happening when we completed our degree. Hostel facility is okay only on those days. Bus facility is good and so many students came from remote location to college by college buses.
